metadata.dataset_name: ABC Bank Annual Report 2024 — RAG Golden Evaluation Dataset

schema.source_passage: The PDF chunk the question is based on
schema.question: User query to send to the RAG chatbot
schema.question_type: One of: Factual | Inferential | Comparative | Multi-hop | Numerical | Negative
schema.page_section: Reference to the source page/section in the PDF
schema.eval_hint: Guidance note for scoring the chatbot response

golden_dataset.source_passage: ABC Bank reported total assets of $4.2 trillion for the fiscal year 2024, a 7% increase from the previous year, reflecting organic loan growth and the consolidation of two acquired entities in the Asia-Pacific region.
golden_dataset.question: What were ABC Bank's total assets in fiscal year 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: $4.2 trillion

golden_dataset.source_passage: The bank's net interest margin (NIM) stood at 3.45% in Q4 2024, compared to 3.12% in Q4 2023.
golden_dataset.question: What was ABC Bank's net interest margin in Q4 2024?

golden_dataset.source_passage: ABC Bank's non-performing loan (NPL) ratio decreased from 2.8% in 2023 to 1.9% in 2024.
golden_dataset.question: What was the NPL ratio of ABC Bank in 2024?

golden_dataset.source_passage: The Board declared a final dividend of $0.85 per share for fiscal year 2024.
golden_dataset.question: What dividend per share did ABC Bank declare for FY2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: $0.85 per share

golden_dataset.source_passage: Operating expenses rose to $12.3 billion in 2024, driven by technology investment and headcount growth.
golden_dataset.question: What were ABC Bank's total operating expenses in 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: $12.3 billion

golden_dataset.source_passage: The Common Equity Tier 1 (CET1) capital ratio was 13.2% as of December 31, 2024, well above the regulatory minimum of 4.5%.
golden_dataset.question: What was ABC Bank's CET1 ratio at year-end 2024?

golden_dataset.source_passage: ABC Bank operates across 42 countries and has approximately 87,000 employees worldwide.
golden_dataset.question: In how many countries does ABC Bank operate?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: 42 countries

golden_dataset.source_passage: Retail banking revenue grew 11% year-on-year to $18.6 billion in 2024.
golden_dataset.question: What was ABC Bank's retail banking revenue in 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: $18.6 billion

golden_dataset.source_passage: ABC Bank's credit rating was upgraded to AA- by S&P in March 2024.
golden_dataset.question: What credit rating did S&P assign to ABC Bank in 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: AA- (upgraded in March 2024)

golden_dataset.source_passage: The bank's return on equity (ROE) improved from 9.8% in 2023 to 12.4% in 2024. Management attributed this to cost efficiency programs and higher lending volumes.
golden_dataset.question: Why did ABC Bank's ROE improve in 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Due to cost efficiency programs and higher lending volumes.

golden_dataset.source_passage: Provision for credit losses fell by 34% to $2.1 billion in 2024, reflecting improved macroeconomic conditions and tighter underwriting standards.
golden_dataset.question: What factors led to the reduction in ABC Bank's provision for credit losses?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Improved macroeconomic conditions and tighter underwriting standards.

golden_dataset.source_passage: Digital transactions accounted for 73% of all retail transactions in 2024, up from 58% in 2022.
golden_dataset.question: What trend can be inferred about customer banking behaviour from 2022 to 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Customers are increasingly using digital channels for banking transactions.

golden_dataset.source_passage: The bank launched a green bond issuance of $2 billion in 2024 to fund renewable energy and sustainable infrastructure projects.
golden_dataset.question: What does ABC Bank's $2 billion green bond issuance indicate about its strategic priorities?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: ABC Bank is prioritising ESG and sustainable finance as part of its strategy.

golden_dataset.source_passage: Investment banking fees dropped 18% to $4.7 billion due to a slowdown in M&A activity globally.
golden_dataset.question: What external factor is implied to have negatively affected ABC Bank's investment banking fees?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: A global slowdown in merger and acquisition (M&A) activity.

golden_dataset.source_passage: The bank's loan-to-deposit ratio rose from 78% in 2023 to 85% in 2024.
golden_dataset.question: What can be inferred about ABC Bank's lending aggressiveness in 2024 relative to 2023?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: ABC Bank became more aggressive in lending relative to deposits held in 2024.

golden_dataset.source_passage: Regulatory fines totalling $320 million were incurred in 2024 related to AML compliance failures in two jurisdictions.
golden_dataset.question: What risk area does the $320 million fine exposure highlight for ABC Bank?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Anti-money laundering (AML) compliance risk.

golden_dataset.source_passage: The bank's liquidity coverage ratio (LCR) was 138% at year-end 2024, exceeding the 100% regulatory requirement under Basel III.
golden_dataset.question: Did ABC Bank meet the regulatory LCR requirement in 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Yes, with an LCR of 138%, exceeding the 100% regulatory minimum.

golden_dataset.source_passage: The bank's interest expense rose 22% to $8.9 billion due to higher central bank policy rates.
golden_dataset.question: What caused the increase in ABC Bank's interest expense in 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Higher central bank policy rates.

golden_dataset.source_passage: In 2023, net profit was $7.8 billion. In 2024, net profit rose to $9.4 billion.
golden_dataset.question: By how much did ABC Bank's net profit increase from 2023 to 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: $1.6 billion increase (from $7.8B to $9.4B).

golden_dataset.source_passage: Retail banking contributed 48% of total revenue in 2024; corporate banking contributed 31%; investment banking contributed 21%.
golden_dataset.question: Which business segment contributed the most revenue in 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Retail banking, at 48% of total revenue.

golden_dataset.source_passage: Cost-to-income ratio was 54% in 2023 and improved to 49% in 2024.
golden_dataset.question: Did the cost-to-income ratio improve or worsen in 2024 compared to 2023?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Improved — it decreased from 54% to 49%, indicating better cost efficiency.

golden_dataset.source_passage: Peer bank XYZ Corp reported a CET1 of 11.8% while ABC Bank reported 13.2% in 2024.
golden_dataset.question: How does ABC Bank's capital position compare to XYZ Corp?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: ABC Bank is better capitalised with a CET1 of 13.2% vs XYZ Corp's 11.8%.

golden_dataset.source_passage: Net interest income was $22.1B in 2024 vs $19.6B in 2023; non-interest income was $11.4B vs $11.1B in 2023.
golden_dataset.question: Which income stream grew faster — net interest income or non-interest income?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Net interest income grew faster (~12.8% growth vs ~2.7% for non-interest income).

golden_dataset.source_passage: Retail banking revenue was $18.6B in 2024 (11% YoY growth). Total bank revenue was $33.5B.
golden_dataset.question: What was ABC Bank's retail banking revenue in 2023, and what share of total 2024 revenue did retail represent?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: 2023 retail revenue ≈ $16.8B (18.6/1.11). Retail = 55.5% of 2024 total revenue.

golden_dataset.source_passage: CET1 ratio was 13.2%. Risk-weighted assets (RWAs) were $1.8 trillion.
golden_dataset.question: What was ABC Bank's CET1 capital in absolute dollar terms?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: ≈ $237.6 billion (13.2% × $1.8 trillion).

golden_dataset.source_passage: Operating expenses were $12.3B. Total revenue was $33.5B. Cost-to-income target is below 50%.
golden_dataset.question: Did ABC Bank meet its cost-to-income target in 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Yes. Cost-to-income = 12.3/33.5 ≈ 36.7%, well below the 50% target.
golden_dataset.eval_hint: Two-step: calculate then compare to target

golden_dataset.source_passage: The NPL ratio fell from 2.8% to 1.9% on a gross loan book of $950 billion in 2024.
golden_dataset.question: What was the approximate value of non-performing loans in 2024?

golden_dataset.source_passage: Dividends paid totalled $3.2 billion. Net profit was $9.4 billion. There are 3.76 billion shares outstanding.
golden_dataset.question: What was ABC Bank's dividend payout ratio and earnings per share (EPS) in 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Payout ratio = 3.2/9.4 ≈ 34%. EPS = 9.4B/3.76B ≈ $2.50 per share.

golden_dataset.source_passage: Return on assets (ROA) was 0.22% in 2024. Total assets were $4.2 trillion.
golden_dataset.question: What was ABC Bank's approximate net profit implied by ROA and total assets?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: ≈ $9.24 billion (0.22% × $4.2T) — consistent with the reported $9.4B net profit.

golden_dataset.source_passage: Total deposits were $3.1 trillion and total loans were $2.6 trillion.
golden_dataset.question: What was ABC Bank's loan-to-deposit ratio?

golden_dataset.source_passage: Fee income was $6.8B in 2024 and $5.9B in 2023.
golden_dataset.question: What was the percentage growth in fee income from 2023 to 2024?

golden_dataset.source_passage: Staff costs were $5.4B and technology spend was $3.1B in 2024. Total opex was $12.3B.
golden_dataset.question: What percentage of total operating expenses did staff costs represent?

golden_dataset.source_passage: The bank's market capitalisation was $78.4 billion. Net profit was $9.4 billion.
golden_dataset.question: What was ABC Bank's price-to-earnings (P/E) multiple in 2024?

golden_dataset.source_passage: Tier 1 capital was $245B. RWAs were $1.8 trillion.
golden_dataset.question: What was ABC Bank's Tier 1 capital ratio?

golden_dataset.source_passage: Wealth management AUM grew from $620B to $710B in 2024.
golden_dataset.question: By what amount did wealth management AUM grow in 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: $90 billion (from $620B to $710B).

golden_dataset.source_passage: ABC Bank reported total assets of $4.2 trillion and net profit of $9.4 billion in 2024.
golden_dataset.question: What was ABC Bank's share price on January 15, 2024?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: This information is not available in the provided document.
golden_dataset.eval_hint: RAG must NOT hallucinate; correct answer = 'not in context'

golden_dataset.source_passage: The bank serves retail and corporate clients across 42 countries.
golden_dataset.question: Who is ABC Bank's chief technology officer?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: This information is not mentioned in the report.

golden_dataset.source_passage: Provision for credit losses was $2.1 billion in 2024.
golden_dataset.question: What was the provision for credit losses broken down by industry sector?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Sector-level breakdown is not provided in this excerpt.
golden_dataset.eval_hint: Partial info — granular answer not in context

golden_dataset.source_passage: Total revenue was $33.5 billion in 2024.
golden_dataset.question: What was ABC Bank's revenue in 2019?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Historical 2019 data is not covered in this report.

golden_dataset.source_passage: The bank launched a green bond of $2 billion for renewable energy projects.
golden_dataset.question: Which specific renewable energy projects were funded by the green bond?
golden_dataset.ground_truth_answer: Project-level details are not disclosed in the report.
